result.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up conversation between Bernard Huang (Clearscope) and Jason Gong (GrowthX.AI) discussing personal lives, company updates, and industry trends.](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bernard is facing challenges with Clearscope, including revenue decline and market shifts due to AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Both discuss the potential societal impacts of AI, including job displacement and geopolitical tensions](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Clearscope is planning a competitive strategy against Surfer, including price matching and new features](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Jason's company GrowthX.AI is focusing on productized services to deliver value in the AI-driven content landscape](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates

  - [Jason now lives in Oakland with his wife and 2-year-old son](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Bernard moved to Austin for tax benefits and founding team connections](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Bernard shares struggles with depression and professional challenges](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Company Updates

  - [Clearscope facing 40% revenue decline from peak](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Implementing new AI features (categorization, clustering, drafting) to catch up with market](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Planning competitive strategy against Surfer (price matching, AI drafting, affiliate program)](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [GrowthX.AI focusing on productized services, finding success in delivering value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

### Industry Trends and Challenges

  - [SEO becoming a "ghost channel" with diminishing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [AI writing for AI consumption, raising questions about the industry's direction](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Potential job displacement and societal unrest due to AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/fsBNioZXkC7TU8avEU6E4sTZ7ggRidNX?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
